summary: Security focus review of CC-0117 (replace static ExternalSecrets with operator projection). No security issues found. OpenBao policy changes are comment-only verification notes in the established CC-0112/CC-0116 style — git diff over deploy/openbao/policies/*.hcl shows no grant/capability changes and no path widening; the operator-projected admin-password ExternalSecret reads bootstrap/{ns}/{keystone}/admin which is already covered by the existing read-only kv-v2/data/bootstrap/* grant. setup-auth.sh role bindings untouched. No hardcoded secrets (the //nolint:gosec G101 on adminPasswordSecretNameSuffix is a correct false-positive suppression — it is a Secret NAME suffix, not a credential). The admin-password Secret is ESO-owned (CreationPolicy: Owner) and watched via an index-backed MapFunc, not EnqueueRequestForOwner, so the credential-rotation watch is functional.

tests_checklist.item: Secret-handling paths covered by tests (managed reads operator-owned Secret; brownfield ref preserved)

code_quality_checklist.item: No secrets passed as command-line args / no in-process secret exposure introduced

security_checklist.item: S3: No hardcoded secrets — adminPasswordSecretNameSuffix is a name suffix with correct //nolint:gosec G101 annotation
OpenBao policy diffs are comment-only, read-only, no path widening (eso-management.hcl, eso-control-plane.hcl)
ESO ExternalSecret reads bootstrap/{ns}/{keystone}/admin under the pre-existing kv-v2/data/bootstrap/* read grant — no new write/wildcard scope
S5: admin password never logged; condition messages carry no secret material
Watch on ESO-owned Secret uses index-backed MapFunc (not EnqueueRequestForOwner) so rotation events are not silently dropped

architecture_checklist.item: Per-CP Secret name + per-CP OpenBao path prevent cross-ControlPlane credential collision

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No security-mitigation duplication or divergence vs sibling reconciler

fail_fast_checklist.item: ExternalSecret errors surface as AdminPasswordReady=False with explicit reason, not swallowed

defensive_checklist.item: effectiveAdminPasswordSecretRef returns SecretRefSpec by value (plain string struct) — cannot alias/mutate cp.Spec
